# MythRealms — Luxury Jewelry Inspired by Chinese Mythology

## Key Pages
- Home: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app
- Beast Collection: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/collections/beast-pendants
- 28 Mansions: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/collections/28-mansions
- Guardian Quiz: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/guardian-quiz
- Blog: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/blog

## About
MythRealms creates handcrafted luxury jewelry inspired by the Classic of Mountains and Seas,
China's oldest bestiary. Each piece features 14k gold, sterling silver, or authentic gemstones
and tells a story from a 2,000-year-old legend.

## Collections
- Mythical Beasts: 12 designs (Nine-Tailed Fox necklace, Qilin bracelet, Azure Dragon ring, Phoenix necklace, etc.)
- 28 Mansions Star Bracelets: 28 beaded bracelets, one for each Chinese lunar mansion
- Five Elements: Wood (jade), Fire (carnelian), Earth (tiger eye), Metal (moonstone), Water (sodalite)
- Four Seasons: 12 seasonal pieces from cherry blossom to winter snowflake
- Zodiac Amulets: 12 Chinese zodiac medallions in 14k gold
- Artist Collaborations: Limited editions of 30-100 pieces

## Facts
- Every piece handcrafted to order (2-3 week production time)
- Free shipping on US orders over $69.99
- Ships to 36 countries
- 30-day return policy
- Pricing: $32.99 - $188.99
